data.nodeLabelPath: Cell Phones & Accessories:Accessories:Chargers & Power Adapters:Wall Chargers
data.title: Anker Phone Charger, 65W 3-Port Fast Compact Foldable USB C Charger Block, Type C Charger Fast Charging for MacBook Pro/Air, iPad Pro, Galaxy S20, Dell XPS 13, Note 20/10+, iPhone 17 Series, and More | GaN Charger Fast Charging for MacBook Pro/ Air, iPad Pro, Galaxy S20, Dell XPS 13, Note 20/10+, iPhone 17 Series, and More
features: The Only Charger You Need: Say goodbye to your old chargers. Anker 735 Charger (Nano II 65W) has the power you need to fast charge your phone, tablet, and USB-C notebook from a single charger.

High-Speed Charging: Connect a single device to get a 65W max charge—that’s enough to power up a 2020 MacBook Pro 13″ at full speed. And when you connect three devices, power will be distributed efficiently between ports to ensure you get the best charge.
Compact Design: Power up to 3 devices with a charger that’s roughly the size of an AirPods Pro case.

Powered by GaN II Technology: With a 100% increase in operating frequency, an innovative stacked design, and an upgraded circuit board structure, GaN II technology makes our latest charger smaller without sacrificing a drop of power.
What You Get: Anker 735 Charger (Nano II 65W) / PowerPort III 3-Port 65W Pod, welcome guide, our worry-free 18-month warranty, and friendly customer service.
data.overviews: {"Brand":"Anker","Connector Type":"USB Type C, USB Type A","Compatible Devices":"Headphones, Tablets, Laptops, Cellular Phones, iPhone 15 / 15 Pro / 14 / 14 Plus / 14 Pro / 14 Pro Max / 13 mini / 13 / 13 Pro / 13 Pro Max / 12 mini / 12 / 12 Pro / 12 Pro Max / SE (2nd Gen)","Compatible Phone Models":"iPhone 16 / 16 Pro / 15 / 15 Pro / 14 / 14 Plus / 14 Pro / 14 Pro Max / 13 mini / 13 / 13 Pro / 13 Pro Max / 12 mini / 12 / 12 Pro / 12 Pro Max / SE (2nd Gen)/ 11 / 11 Pro / 11 Pro Max / XS / XS Max / XR / X / 8 Plus / 8 / 7 Plus / 7 / 6 Plus, iPad mini 5 / 4, iPad Pro Galaxy S21 / S21+ / S21 Ultra / Galaxy S10 / S10+ / S10e / S9 / S9+ / S8 / S8+, Note 20 / 20 Ultra / 10 / 9 / 8, Pixel 3a / 3XL / 3 / 2 XL / 2, and More","Included Components":"PowerPort III 3-Port 65W Pod","Special Feature":"Fast Charging, Retractable Plug","Color":"Black","Input Voltage":"240 Volts","Amperage":"3 Amps","Total USB Ports":"3"}

data.nodeLabelPath: Cell Phones & Accessories:Accessories:Chargers & Power Adapters:Portable Power Banks
data.title: ANKER 633 Magnetic Battery, 10,000mAh Foldable Wireless Portable Charger, 20W USB-C Power Delivery Power Bank with Stand, Magsafe-Compatible for iPhone 16/15/14/13/12 Series (Black)
features: Power Up in a Flash: Enjoy the convenience of a 20W USB-C Power Delivery port with this portable charger, charging an iPhone up to 3 times faster and keeping you connected during crucial moments. Ideal for those who need a quick power boost on the go.

Effortless Charging Alignment: Benefit from the strong magnets of this MagSafe battery pack that ensure your device snaps into place for a secure, optimized wireless charging experience every time. Charging your phone has never been more convenient. Note: MagSafe-compatible wireless charging delivers up to 7.5W.

View and Charge Simultaneously: The innovative 2-in-1 design of this MagSafe battery pack not only charges your devices wirelessly but also transforms into a foldable stand for hands-free viewing, enhancing your daily screen interactions.

Travel Light with Power: Despite its compact size, this portable charger boasts a 10,000mAh battery capacity, capable of recharging an iPhone 13 Pro up to 1.8 times, making it an essential travel companion for keeping your devices powered up.
What You Get: Anker 633 Magnetic Battery (MagGo), 2ft (0.6m) USB-C to USB-C charging cable, welcome guide, our worry-free 24-month warranty, and friendly customer service.p

data.nodeLabelPath: Cell Phones & Accessories:Accessories:Chargers & Power Adapters:Wall Chargers
data.title: Anker iPhone Charger, 2-Pack 20W Fast USB C Charger Block, Type C Charger Fast Charging for iPhone 17/17 Pro Max/16 Series/iPad Pro and More (Black, 2 Pack & 2 Cable)
features: 20W High-Speed Charging: Enjoy fast charging with 20W max output for your iPhone, Samsung phones, and other devices.
Simultaneous Dual-Port Charging: With the ability to use USB-C and USB-A ports simultaneously, power two devices at once without compromising speed or performance.
Small and Compact: Designed with portability in mind, take the compact charger with you wherever you go, ensuring that you never run out of power when you need it the most.
Safety Features You Can Trust: Anker's proprietary system includes overvoltage protection, temperature control, and other safety features designed to help safeguard your devices while charging.
What You Get: Anker Charger (2-Port, 20W), 2-pack 5 ft USB-C to USB-C cable, welcome guide, 18-month warranty, and our friendly customer service.

data.nodeLabelPath: Electronics:Portable Audio & Video:Portable Speakers & Docks:Portable Bluetooth Speakers
data.title: Soundcore Boom 2 By Anker, Outdoor Speaker, 80W, Subwoofer, BassUp 2.0, 24H Playtime, IPX7 Waterproof, Floatable, RGB Lights, USB-C, Custom EQ, Portable for Camping and Beach - Black
features: Big Bass You Can Feel, Outdoors or In: soundcore Boom 2 delivers deep, punchy bass you can feel. As an outdoor bluetooth speaker, it features a dedicated subwoofer and BassUp 2.0 technology to deliver deeper, harder-hitting bass — helping fill open spaces like campsites, patios, and backyards with powerful sound.

Clear, Balanced Sound at Any Volume: soundcore Boom 2 combines crisp highs, detailed mids, and rich bass in one powerful outdoor bluetooth speaker. Smart tuning keeps the sound clear and balanced, whether you’re relaxing with friends or turning things up.

All‑Day Playtime, Plus Backup Power: Take soundcore Boom 2 on all-day adventures with up to 24 hours of playtime on a single charge. When phones start running low, the built-in power bank keeps them going — and when the speaker itself needs a top-up, fast charging gets it back quickly. Perfect for trips where outlets aren't an option. (Playtime varies by volume level and audio content.)

Waterproof, Floatable, and Ready for Anything: Built for life outside, soundcore Boom 2 is an outdoor bluetooth speaker with an IPX7 waterproof rating and a floatable design. Bring it to the pool, the beach, or out in the rain—no worries, just uninterrupted music.

Customize the Sound, Set the Vibe: Adjust your audio with the customizable Pro EQ in the Soundcore app for a sound that fits your preferences. Built‑in RGB lights add a splash of color to match the mood—whether it’s a beach hang, a late‑night bonfire, or a chill backyard moment.

FROM ANKER — TRUSTED BY 80 MILLION+ USERS WORLDWIDE: Engineered by Anker, the world’s #1 charging brand, soundcore Boom 2 delivers powerful outdoor sound you can trust. With deep, punchy bass, long‑lasting battery life, and a waterproof, floatable design, it's ready for any adventure.
data.overviews: {"Brand":"Soundcore","Manufacturer":"Anker","Speaker Maximum Output Power":"80 watts","Frequency Response":"45 hertz","Connectivity Technology":"Bluetooth"}

data.nodeLabelPath: Cell Phones & Accessories:Accessories:Chargers & Power Adapters:Portable Power Banks
data.title: Anker Power Bank, 20,000mAh Travel Essential Portable Charger with Built-in USB-C Cable, 3-Port 87W Max Fast Charging Battery Pack, for MacBook, iPhone 16/15 Series, Samsung, Switch, and More
features: 87W Power to Share: Distribute 87W across three devices, with a single device receiving up to 65W, to rapidly charge iPhones, Samsung phones. Quickly charge a 14" MacBook Pro to 50% in under 40 minutes.

Speedy Cable Charging: Utilize the built-in cable to elevate your iPhone 15 Pro to 58% or a MacBook Air to 52% in 30 minutes. You can also fully recharge this power bank in 1.5 hours with a 65W charger.
20,000mAh for Extended Use: Eliminate concerns about battery depletion with a 20,000mAh power bank that ensures consistent, reliable charging for all your devices, also approved for airline travel.
Lasts Longer, Charges Faster: The integrated USB-C cable is designed to endure, withstanding over 10,000 bends for dependable charging and convenient storage.
What You Get: Anker Power Bank (20K, 87W, Built-In USB-C Cable), 6.2 × 2.9 × 1.0 in (15.5 oz), welcome guide, 18-month warranty, and friendly customer service.

items.author: rlaw
items.title: Awful charge quality
items.content: Sound is really good I bought two of them but also I have to charge them so much. I'm used to jbl which sounds better is more reliable and the charge lasts for years. Unfortunately jbl lost their commitment to quality do I have to buy Chinese trash like this.

items.author: Mike S.
items.title: Survived being left outside for a week in multiple thunderstorms
items.content:
I bought this as a gift and the recipient took it out by the pool and listened to music with it for hours. The sound is fantastic, rich base and clean vocals. The recipient absolutely loves it.

Today, more than a week later and after multiple violent thunder storms, we went out to clean up the pool deck for a pool party we are going to have today, we saw the speaker still sitting outside and imagined that it was completely ruined after only one day’s use.

I went back to the Amazon product page where I had purchased this, looked through all of the features and was cautiously optimistic after having read that it is waterproof, can be floated on water and wouldn’t be affected by rain.
We powered it up and just as promised in the features, the thing came to life and played just fine. What a fantastic speaker!

It’s just exactly the right size, the handle is nice for grabbing it up and moving it around and the sound is great for a speaker this size.
I love that they can survive the heat, the sun and multiple thunderstorms. Not that we will continue to treat it that way, but it’s nice to know that it can survive if you accidentally leave it out in the weather.

items.author: Hardy Sellers
items.title: Beware
items.content: Battery dead less than a year. Beware.

items.author: Bits N' Pieces
items.title: Blew away my expectations!
items.content: I was sceptical about this bluetooth speaker's power and ability to fill a room with sound, when i first saw reviews of it on youtube, but after hearing it in person now and tweaking EQ settings a bit more to my liking on the soundcore app, the Soudcore Boom 2 is freaking amazing! Not only is it light weight and portable, but it really packs a puch when listening to music and watching movies! Im really tempted to buy a 2nd one now to have True Wireless Stereo! Its an amazing bluetooth speaker for its price point!

items.author: Norm Mock
items.title: Just wow!!!
items.content: I bought these for my room this speaker is hands down the best Bluetooth speaker I have for under 100 dollars is insane

items.author: Amanda
items.title: Yes! This is the one!
items.content: This thing is tough, sounds amazing and is definitely water proof! My teenager and his friends love it! The lights are fun as well.

items.author: Stacy O.
items.title: Great speaker for the price
items.content: Great little Bluetooth speaker. Great sound quality that's plenty loud enough. I have older speakers from another big name brand (with higher price tag). This speaker performs as good, if not better. I've only had it a few months, but battery lasts a very long time. Definitely staying with Anker.

items.author: Veronica Grimsley
items.title: Great traveling companion
items.content: Great sound, only thing missing is USB outlet

items.author: Southpaw
items.title: Not compatible with older model
items.content: This speaker will not pair with any previous model. Very misleading considering its the same sku.

items.author: Paul Hansen
items.title: Seriously impressive
items.content: For $85 on sale, this thing is an absolute steal. Clarity and bass are top tier and far superior to what Sony or UE offers at this price point.

items.author: Joanna
items.title: Amazing sound quality and portability!
items.content: Wow! I just ordered this for $85 and I’m blown away. This sounds better than any of the smaller Bose speakers I’ve had over the years. It has plenty of base and I can’t imagine most people ever needing anything louder. I think it looks nice, and the lights are sort of cool, although I don’t imagine I’ll use them much. The fact it’s fairly small and waterproof only adds to the value. I also just saw you can pair two speakers together to get stereo sound with separate right and left channels! Most people may not care about this but for me having portable stereo sound would be amazing. l just ordered a second one and I’ll update after I try it. No matter what happens, this is a steal at $85 and probably still a bargain at regular price.

items.author: Dean A. Smith
items.title: Versatile speaker and great sound
items.content: Solid speaker with good volume and bass. I tried it with metal and bluegrass and they both sound great. The speaker is light and easily carried with the handle being a nice touch. It will be great for the beach and pool.

items.author: Deep Thoughts
items.title: Doesn’t work with Partycast.
items.content: ***Model received uses new Auracast, doesn’t connect to Partycast systems like Boom 2 Plus. Go figure.

items.author: Aqua_Mint480
items.title: Quality sound
items.content: Loud and clear, Bass is great. Worth the money, doesn't sound cheap or like it's running out of breath. Got it for shower time and game room cause GTA never has good tunes lol.

items.author: Moe
items.title: Excellent Sound & Speaker
items.content: Beast of a wireless speaker. Make sure to download the soundcore app for it, set the EQ settings to make it crisper, or else you’re going to be stuck with flatter sound. Check the video for the sound quality!

items.author: Eric
items.title: GOOD BASS GOOD VIBES
items.content: 10/10 good base felt even when low volume and it floats grab it durring a sale and you won't be disappointed use it for music in the dish pit at work and its fantastic

items.author: John M
items.title: Fair price for a really good speaker.
items.content: Awesome for $89 bucks! I was always impressed with other Anker products so took a chance on this speaker. I needed something to throw on the deck when I'm grilling and this thing pumps. Bass is good. Sound quality is good. Only thing I have to compare it to, is an old bose SoundLink mini (which impressed the hell out of me) and this Anker is similar in sound quality with the ability to get louder.

items.author: Jeff Coe
items.title: Enjoy this speaker
items.content: I was not sure for I have a Bose Sound Link. But it came unpacked and turned it on. Wow there is a lot of sound and a lot of bass. I've now had it for over a month and the sound is even better. Thinking about buying another one so we would have the full stereo affect.

items.author: Ray jagger
items.title: Good Party speaker
items.content: Works well as small party speaker

items.author: J. mcCoy
items.title: Amazing! Buy one!
items.content: I play bass guitar in the praise and worship team at my church. I bought this Bluetooth speaker for working up set songs. I cannot believe what I got for the price. The bass is super clear and punchy. It blows the JBL I’ve been using for years away. It is going to make working up songs so much easier because I can hear the bass so well. Buy one!

items.author: LiLi
items.title: Defective item
items.content: came looking just fine, turns out it didn’t wanna charge and is broken internally so it’s useless. I wasn’t even able to use it and i feel like it charges well but i can’t tell because it came DEFECTIVE.

items.author: Leethal
items.title: Nice job making this one.
items.content: Slim east to use and on the go!!

items.author: Night Owl
items.title: Works Well, It's a Buy!
items.content: Great phone charging bank, better than my old anker of the same variety, an upgrade. Cord built in, digital charge read out, and great capacity.

items.author: S.G.
items.title: Cord stopped working after just only days.
items.content: Have always been a huge proponent of Anker products ever since I had a battery bank years ago that I had to replace because it got lost. Unfortunately, this product was not what I thought it would be. Works well and charges fast, however, within days the built in USB-C cable stopped working. The battery bank still works fine, but now I need to carry around a cord, which defeats the purpose of why I bought this in the first place.

items.author: ERIC
items.title: Device was confiscated on a domestic fight within China
items.content: I am writing to provide feedback regarding the product. While I am happy with the quality of the device, I encountered a significant issue during travel. The product was confiscated on a domestic flight within China. It appears the device does not comply with local policies for air travel because it lacks the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) marking. I wanted to bring this to your attention so you are aware of these requirements for customers traveling in that region.

items.author: LiLi
items.title: Defective item
items.content: came looking just fine, turns out it didn’t wanna charge and is broken internally so it’s useless. I wasn’t even able to use it and i feel like it charges well but i can’t tell because it came DEFECTIVE.

items.author: Leethal
items.title: Nice job making this one.
items.content: Slim east to use and on the go!!

items.author: Night Owl
items.title: Works Well, It's a Buy!
items.content: Great phone charging bank, better than my old anker of the same variety, an upgrade. Cord built in, digital charge read out, and great capacity.

items.title: Cord stopped working after just only days.
items.content: Have always been a huge proponent of Anker products ever since I had a battery bank years ago that I had to replace because it got lost. Unfortunately, this product was not what I thought it would be. Works well and charges fast, however, within days the built in USB-C cable stopped working. items.content: I am writing to provide feedback regarding the product. While I am happy with the quality of the device, I encountered a significant issue during travel. The product was confiscated on a domestic flight within China. It appears the device does not comply with local policies for air travel because it lacks the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) marking. I wanted to bring this to your attention so you are aware of these requirements for customers traveling in that region.

items.author: John Villanueva
items.title: Must have to travel.
items.content:
I travel a lot and this is a must have!
Batterlife is great! Charges phones super fast.
Quite heavy, very convenient to use.
I bring this wherever I go!

items.author: D. Wiles
items.title: Great powerbank
items.content: Great charger

items.author: ed
items.title: Lasted only little over a year
items.content: I bought this awesome Anker power bank February 2025. It has worked flawlessly ever since till now June 2026. It doesn't not charge any of my devices anymore properly. Very disappointed since im a big Anker supporter and have many of their products.

items.author: CHARLES
items.title: Don't buy if you're traveling to china!
items.content: False advertising! I specifically purchased this power bank to go to china. However it was confiscated upon my arrival at the airport in Shanghai. You cannot travel to china with this even though it's advertised that way. There is no CCC symbol which is what you need to have or they will take it. Absolute waste of money, do not buy for a trip to china.

items.author: Jamby
items.title: Pretty decent, only one real flaw
items.content: It charges my phone relatively quick, the device itself takes a little while to charge but that makes sense if I can’t charge my phone multiple times. Really my biggest complaint is how short the charging cord is attached to the bank. I wish it was on a pull cord, or make the cord wrap around the bank. Having the cord be about 6 inches is annoying

items.author: Ross
items.title: Very good battery pack!
items.content: 10 out of 10 would recommend! Its a little bigger than my phone but does it charge! My phone could be in the low 20% and this will fully charge it and the power bank still has 87% left on it. I ordered this at the perfect time being we had a tornado and lost power for a few hours. If i didn't have it my phone would have been dead from the news updates I was getting.

items.author: Amazon Customer
items.title: Great for charging multiple devices
items.content: Perfect for travel. Love the digital display.

items.author: Ed Wick
items.title: Awesome, Powerful, and Fast to Charge!
items.content: Awesome and powerful. It charges other powerful devices such as the iPhone quickly and it charges quickly with a higher voltage transformer/plug. At first, I thought that the power bank might be a bit bulky and heavy, but it would fit in a pocket and charge my iPhone and other devices--so a good size. I purchased too many other power banks that claimed to be powerful and portable, but while they were more portable, the power was seriously lacking. I love the built-in USB C cable design; there is no need to carry a separate USB-C cable when you are in the airplane or on the road. The display clearly tells you the percentage of charge remaining.

items.author: g.nuggs
items.title: Great battery
items.content: Quite heavy as noted but has enough battery to keep my phone charged on a 6 hour road trip with my phone gps on the whole way on the highest brightness setting and then some. Charges up quickly too. I don’t think I would carry this in my purse with me but on trips, this is great to have.

items.author: Sanjay S.
items.title: Dual charging ports
items.content: Good charge, however bulky in size.

items.author: Mike Schmidt
items.title: Good Value!
items.content: Hefty super powered battery pack. Love that it has both a built in cable (USB-C) and the ability to add a longer one (both USB-A and USB-C)!

items.author: michael duffy
items.title: doesnt work
items.content: Worked one time, then broke. No returns allowed. There is a reason why it's on sale

items.author: Victor Cheruyot
items.title: New and pretty good
items.content: It is working well and in good condition

items.author: Daniel
items.title: Good and reliable power bank.
items.content: Took this power bank to Nepal on Annapurna Trek. Can only say good things about it. Recharges fast, and at one overnight stop I used it to recharge the phone and both of my headlamps, since the electrical outlet at the place we stayed was unavailable. I also like that the cable is stored in such a way that it doesn't protrude beyond the body of the charger and is not dangling.

items.author: Rob Yull
items.title: High capacity multi-unit portable battery
items.content:
Had been shopping around for a portable charging unit that could charge my family's phones while on vacation. Wanted something portable with a large capacity. I have had other Anker hardware and had good luck with them before.

While this unit is not small, it is still relatively portable. It fit in my travel backpack, as well as the sling backpack I was planning on wearing on the trip.

It can charge 3 devices at the same time. It has 1 USB-C port, 1 USB-A port, and an integrated USB-C cable. All of the ports have fast charging capability.

The integrated cable can be used to plug into a USB-C power source to charge battery. The other USB-C port can also be used to charge the battery. The USB-A port is only for charging other devices.

It also has a display that reports the percentage of battery capacity it has remaining.

I used the charger almost every day. I could charge my phone from about 50% to 100% in less than an hour, even when multiple devices were being charged. I had also brought an extra long USB-A to USB-C cable, so I could use my phone, while the battery was still in the sling bag.

Whlie it isn't the smallest battery, the charging capacity as well as the ability to charge multiple devices was a big plus.
